song.title: Y'all Means All
song.description: Full lyrics to 'Y'all Means All' from Cowboys EP by Agust Islandia (Agust Smari Bjarkarson).

og.title: Y'all Means All Lyrics - Cowboys EP
og.description: Full lyrics to Y'all Means All from Cowboys EP.

twitter.title: Y'all Means All Lyrics - Agust Islandia
twitter.description: Full official lyrics for Y'all Means All.

essay: Y'all Means All is the EP's communal manifesto, redefining country dance-floor belonging through explicit inclusion. It turns a slogan into a lived ethic of dignity and welcome.
song.lyricsHtml:
Cowboys and cowgirls dancin side by side
Some lead some follow just go with the ride
No one's countin who's wrong or who's right
We're just spinnin together on a Saturday night

Yall means all where the jukebox shines bright
We're two steppin together in the glow of the night
From ranch hands to dreamers we all stand tall
Love's the only rule and yall means all

Bearded men and Stetsons waltzing slow and true
Boots kickin dust while he's holdin you
We built our own family right here in these walls
Cause love don't ask questions when yall means all

Yall means all where the jukebox shines bright
We're two steppin together in the glow of the night
From ranch hands to dreamers we all stand tall
Love's the only rule and yall means all

We spent too long hidin who we are inside
But tonight on this floor there's no need to hide
Every cowboy's heart deserves a song to recall
And ours is the truth that yall means all

I'm a gay cowboy and I'm standin tall
Boots on the dance floor answerin the call
This life is my story no shame at all
Cause love's what we're ridin and yall means all

Yall means all where the jukebox shines bright
We're two steppin together in the glow of the night
From ranch hands to dreamers we all stand tall
Love's the only rule and yall means all
Love's the only rule and yall means all
